content_body: My husband and I came up for a long weekend to celebrate our 2nd anniversary. Along for the ride was my 14 month old son, James! We loved staying at the cabin - so peaceful and beautiful. We hike Amicalola Falls and Springer Mountain with our son on my husbands back. We thoroughly enjoyed the weekend and hope to be back! Thank You! - The Kubagawas
title: Peaceful and Beautiful
